message:
refactor(interactive): consolidate overlay input availability and viewport budget

Consolidate duplicated "is the editor input area available?" conditionals
scattered across viewport sizing, rendering, and keyboard dispatch into
canonical methods on PiApp:

- editor_input_is_available(): whether the normal text editor should
  be shown (replaces inline checks in view.rs and viewport calculation)
- custom_overlay_input_is_available(): whether a custom extension overlay
  should receive keys, yielding to higher-priority modal prompts
  (capability prompts, settings, etc.) — fixes bug where custom overlays
  would swallow keys destined for modal prompts
- extension_custom_overlay_rows(): viewport height budget accounting
  for custom overlay chrome (spacer + title + source + content + help)

Adds two tests in interactive/agent.rs verifying overlay reduces
conversation height budget and capability prompts take key priority
over custom overlays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
